gist.headline: New Bot: AvaTube
gist.blurb: Meet the newest member of the social bot family. AvaTube brings AI-powered avatars to the party.
gist.summary: Added AvaTube, a platform for creating and sharing personalized AI avatars, to the Social Bots directory.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and access AvaTube through the community showcase to generate custom social avatars.
gist.visual_concept: A 'Tube' or video-themed setting. Polly the bee acting as a director or viewer of avatars on screens. Represents the addition of a video/avatar social bot.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot wearing a tiny director's beret, hovering next to a stack of retro TVs showing colorful pixel avatars. A chunky robot holds a clapperboard. Lime green (#ecf874) and soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'AVATUBE'. Nostalgic and cute.
